title: Uruguayan Stir Fry with Fish
description: A delicious and quick to make stir fry dish originating from Uruguay, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the freshness of fish with the flavors of Uruguay.

ingredients.name: Fish (white fish fillet)
ingredients.notes: Any white fish fillet will do

ingredients.name: Gooey Honey
ingredients.notes: Optional, for a touch of sweetness

instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the white onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the fermented ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the fish fillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Uruguayan Stir Fry Sauce and gooey honey (if using).
Pour the sauce over the fish and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Garnish with romantic rosemary and serve immediately.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
